_publications._publicationTitle: Induction of apoptosis in neurofibromatosis type 1 malignant peripheral nerve sheath tumor cell lines by a combination of novel farnesyl transferase inhibitors and lovastatin.

_contextSnippet: However, in a stark contrast to the effect on MPNST cells, combination treatments of 500 nM 1 or 2 with 500 nM lovastatin had no observable toxicity on normal primary Schwann cells
details: Combination treatments of 500 nM FTI compounds with 500 nM lovastatin had no observable toxicity on normal primary Schwann cells
